notifications.error: Could not send your message. Please try again later.

contact.title: Contact

hero.title: Search your users actually feel.
hero.subtitle: A hosted search API with org-scoped tokens, per-key origin allow-lists, rate-limit and quota — built so you ship search instead of running infra.

step1.title: 1. Push documents
step1.description: POST your records to a per-org index. Bulk import or single-doc upsert — schema is whatever you send.

step2.title: 2. Mint a search token
step2.description: Issue a short-lived scoped token from your dashboard or server. Locked to an index, an origin, a TTL.

step3.title: 3. Search from the browser
step3.description: Use the typed browser SDK. Single search, multi-search (federated), faceted filters — under 50ms p99.

features.title: What you actually get
features.subtitle: No mystery boxes. Every feature here is shipping today.

scopedTokens.title: Scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: Per-user, per-filter, TTL-bound. Mint server-side, ship to the browser, expire on schedule.

originAllowlist.title: Origin allow-list
originAllowlist.description: Pin every key to specific origins. A leaked key from Twitter doesn't drain your quota.

rateLimitQuota.title: Rate limit & quota
rateLimitQuota.description: Per-key per-minute throttling and per-org monthly quota — both visible in the dashboard before you hit them.

multiSearch.title: Multi-search
multiSearch.description: Run several queries in one round-trip. Build cross-collection autocomplete without N requests.

reindex.title: Zero-downtime reindex
reindex.description: Rebuild an index against a new schema while live traffic keeps hitting the old one. Cut over atomically.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise security
enterpriseSecurity.description: SSO, audit log, IP allow-list, dedicated cluster, and 99.95% SLA. Security controls available from day one, not as an afterthought.

pricing.title: Pay for searches and indexed docs. Nothing else.
pricing.subtitle: 1 search-unit = 1 search request OR 1 indexed document. Cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: For evaluating, hobby projects and side-products.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Production-ready for indie SaaS and small B2B teams.

cta.title: Ready to ship search?
cta.subtitle: Free tier covers most side-projects. No credit card.

testimonials.title: Real results from real teams
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from customers who transformed their search infrastructure with AACsearch.

footer.tagline: Search as a service — scoped tokens, origin allow-lists, and a typed browser SDK.

pricingPage.title: Simple, usage-based pricing
pricingPage.description: Pay for searches and indexed documents. Nothing else. No seat fees, no hidden limits. Cancel anytime.

securityPage.title: Security built into every layer
securityPage.description: API keys hashed and never stored in plaintext. Scoped tokens that narrow, never widen. Tenant isolation enforced at every query.

security.title: Defense in depth
security.subtitle: Every request goes through auth, rate limiting, quota check, and tenant isolation before touching your data.

keyHashing.title: API key hashing
keyHashing.description: All API keys are hashed with SHA-256 and stored as digests. The plaintext is shown once at creation and never again.

scopedTokens.title: Scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: HMAC-signed tokens are locked to a specific index, origin, and TTL. They narrow permissions — never widen them.

originAllowlist.title: Origin allow-list
originAllowlist.description: Pin every API key to specific origins. A leaked key published on Twitter still can't drain your quota.

rateLimiting.title: Rate limiting
rateLimiting.description: Per-key per-minute throttling, enforced server-side. Usage and limits are visible in the dashboard before you hit them.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant isolation
tenantIsolation.description: Every search call is scoped to your organization ID. Cross-org reads are architecturally impossible — not just policy.

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: Every admin action is logged with timestamp, actor, and change. Available on Enterprise plans.

enterprisePage.title: AACsearch for Enterprise
enterprisePage.description: Dedicated infrastructure, SSO, audit log, 99.95% SLA, and signed DPA — everything compliance and security teams require.

enterprise.title: Built for regulated teams
enterprise.subtitle: Unmetered search, dedicated cluster, custom integrations. Contact us and we'll scope a plan for your requirements.

sso.title: SSO (SAML / OIDC)
sso.description: Connect your identity provider — Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, or any SAML 2.0 / OIDC compliant IdP.

dedicatedCluster.title: Dedicated cluster
dedicatedCluster.description: Your indexes run on isolated infrastructure in the region you choose. No noisy neighbours, no shared search nodes.

auditLog.title: Audit log + IP allow-list
auditLog.description: Every admin action is timestamped and attributable. Lock access to a specific IP range for your ops team.

sla.title: 99.95% SLA + signed DPA
sla.description: Contractual uptime guarantee and a signed Data Processing Agreement covering GDPR and CCPA requirements.

prioritySupport.title: Priority support
prioritySupport.description: Dedicated Slack channel. Sub-4-hour first response. Named technical account manager for onboarding and incidents.

customIntegrations.title: Custom integrations
customIntegrations.description: We onboard your CMS, ERP, or proprietary data source. Connector API included; custom connectors on request.

aboutPage.title: About AACsearch
aboutPage.description: We're building the search infrastructure for the next generation of web applications.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.quote: Search should be fast, relevant, and accessible to every developer.
mission.body: AACsearch was founded with a simple belief: great search should not require a team of engineers to maintain or a fortune to operate.

speed.title: Blazing Fast
speed.description: Sub-50ms search responses at any scale, powered by our distributed search infrastructure.

simple.title: Developer First
simple.description: Intuitive REST API, SDKs for every major language, and a dashboard that makes sense.

open.title: Transparent Pricing
open.description: No hidden fees, no lock-in. Pay only for what you use with clear, predictable pricing.

about.title: Why we built AACsearch
about.subtitle: Search infrastructure is hard. Managed services are expensive and opaque. We built the thing we wished existed.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Make production-grade search available to every team — from two-person startups to regulated enterprises — without requiring a dedicated search engineer.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Built on a lightning-fast search engine. We add multi-tenancy, API key management, analytics, and a hosted control plane on top.

openCore.title: No lock-in
openCore.description: Your data is always yours. Export indexes, migrate between plans, or switch to the Enterprise tier. No proprietary data format, no migration tax.

team.title: Team
team.description: A small, focused team. We have shipped search at B2B SaaS companies, e-commerce platforms, and developer tools. We eat our own cooking.

values.title: Values
values.description: Simplicity over cleverness. Documented behaviour over magic. An API that a junior developer can use on day one and a senior can rely on in production.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: Public roadmap, voted by users. We ship incrementally — no big-bang releases. Changelog updated with every deployment.

caseStudiesPage.title: Customer Case Studies
caseStudiesPage.description: See how real companies transformed their search with AACsearch — measurable results, real quotes, zero fluff.

cta.title: Want to be our next case study?
cta.description: If you're using AACsearch and seeing great results, we'd love to hear your story.

customersPage.title: Loved by Developers, Trusted by Businesses
customersPage.description: Join hundreds of companies using AACsearch to power fast, relevant search experiences.

nordikHome.quote: Switching to AACsearch was the easiest infrastructure decision we've made. We cut costs by 5x, our search is faster, and the built-in analytics showed us product gaps we didn't know we had.
nordikHome.author: Erik Lindström

agencyHub.quote: With AACsearch, we provision a new client's search in 15 minutes. Each client thinks they have their own dedicated search infrastructure — and they do. We just manage it all from one dashboard.
agencyHub.author: Marcus Weber

devStream.quote: Elasticsearch was eating 20 hours of our engineering team's week. AACsearch gave us better search with zero maintenance. Our team got 20 hours back, literally overnight.
devStream.author: Priya Sharma

caseStudies.title: Read their full stories
caseStudies.description: Dive deep into how each company transformed their search infrastructure with AACsearch — real numbers, real quotes, real migrations.

devStream.title: DevStream: Zero DevOps, 10x Faster
devStream.excerpt: B2B SaaS platform eliminated 20 hours/week of Elasticsearch maintenance and cut search latency to 50ms.

customers.title: Trusted by builders
customers.subtitle: Early adopters who replaced Algolia, Elasticsearch, or hand-rolled solutions — and stopped worrying about search infra.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce platform
ecommerce.description: Replaced Algolia after the third surprise bill. AACsearch costs a fixed amount each month. The migration took three days. Search is better than before.

saasFounder.title: B2B SaaS founder
saasFounder.description: We needed per-tenant search without building infra. AACsearch scoped tokens meant we shipped in a weekend instead of a sprint.

aiNlp.description: Spell correction, intent detection, AI query rewriting, and natural language search. Zero-click AI answers coming next.

selfHost.description: Dedicated cluster deployment, custom data residency, and on-prem options for regulated industries. Same managed API, your infrastructure.

careers.noRoles: No open roles right now — but we are always interested in exceptional candidates.

culture.description: Remote-first, async-default. We write things down. Meetings are rare and have agendas. Results over hours.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We are early. You will have outsized impact. The codebase is clean — no legacy debt to wade through.

benefits.title: Benefits

learning.title: Learning
learning.description: Conference budget. Paid books and courses. Time to explore new ideas that serve the product.

hiring.title: Hiring process
hiring.description: Two calls and a paid take-home. We respect your time. Decision in under two weeks from first contact.

aiSearchPage.description: Go beyond keywords. AACsearch supports vector, hybrid, and semantic search out of the box — no ML expertise required.

vector.title: Vector Search
vector.description: Find semantically similar results even when exact keywords don't match. Uses embedding models to understand meaning.

hybrid.description: Combine keyword precision with semantic understanding. Configurable weights let you tune relevance for your use case.

semantic.description: Re-rank results using AI to surface the most relevant hits at the top. Improves CTR without changing your indexing.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Surface relevant products for queries like 'comfortable running shoes' even without exact keyword match.

brand.subtitle: Our brand is built on clarity and speed — the same values we bring to search. Use these assets to represent AACsearch accurately.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Use the primary logo on light backgrounds and the reversed logo on dark. Minimum size 24px. Never stretch, rotate, or recolour.

colors.title: Colours
colors.description: Primary: #0F172A (night). Accent: #6366F1 (indigo-500). Use the accent sparingly — for interactive elements and highlights only.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Headings and body: Inter. Monospace: JetBrains Mono. Both available from Google Fonts and Fontsource.

guidelines.title: Usage guidelines
guidelines.description: Do not use the AACsearch logo in a way that implies endorsement. Do not modify the logo. Attribution is always welcome but never required.

assets.title: Asset downloads
assets.description: Download the full brand kit: SVG logo, favicon, og-image template, and colour palette in ASE, Sketch, and Figma format.

contact.title: Brand questions
contact.description: For co-marketing materials, conference sponsorships, or unusual usage questions, email brand@aacsearch.com.

logos.description: Download AACsearch logos in SVG, PNG, and vector formats. Color, monochrome, and dark-background variants included.

sdks.title: Client SDKs
sdks.description: TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, PHP, and Go SDKs for the AACsearch API. Type-safe, well-documented, and published on package registries.

glossaryPage.title: Search Glossary
glossaryPage.description: Plain-language definitions of search, indexing, and relevance concepts used across AACsearch documentation and the industry.

glossary.title: The language of search
glossary.subtitle: Search has its own vocabulary. Use this glossary to understand AACsearch documentation and communicate precisely with your team.

searchIndex.title: Search index
searchIndex.description: A data structure optimised for fast text retrieval. AACsearch maintains a search collection per index, with automatic alias management.

facet.title: Facet
facet.description: A filterable attribute returned alongside search results with document counts. Enables guided navigation without additional API calls.

relevance.title: Relevance
relevance.description: How well a document matches a query. AACsearch combines BM25 text relevance, vector similarity, field weights, and custom boost rules.

invertedIndex.title: Inverted index
invertedIndex.description: The core data structure of full-text search. Maps each token to the documents containing it. AACsearch maintains this automatically.

embedding.title: Embedding
embedding.description: A numeric vector representation of text semantics. AACsearch can store and query embeddings for semantic and hybrid search.

searchUnit.title: Search unit
searchUnit.description: AACsearch billing unit. One search unit equals one search query or one document indexed. Used to calculate your monthly plan allocation.

bm25.title: BM25
bm25.description: A ranking function that scores documents based on term frequency and inverse document frequency. AACsearch uses BM25 as the default text relevance algorithm.

inverted.title: Inverted index
inverted.description: A data structure mapping every unique term in a document collection to the documents containing it. Enables fast full-text search at scale.

vector.title: Vector search
vector.description: A search method that finds documents based on semantic similarity using embeddings, rather than exact keyword matches. AACsearch supports hybrid keyword + vector search.

facets.title: Facets
facets.description: Filters that let users narrow search results by categories, price ranges, ratings, and other attributes. AACsearch computes facet counts server-side on every query.

relevanceTuning.title: Relevance tuning
relevanceTuning.description: The process of adjusting search ranking to surface the most relevant results first. AACsearch supports field weights, boost rules, and custom scoring formulas.

synonyms.title: Synonyms
synonyms.description: Words or phrases treated as equivalent during search. AACsearch supports one-way, multi-way, and multi-word synonym rules managed from the dashboard.

typoTolerance.title: Typo tolerance
typoTolerance.description: The ability to return correct results even when the search query contains spelling errors. AACsearch uses configurable Levenshtein distance and phonetic matching.

trustPage.title: Trust Center
trustPage.description: Security posture, compliance certifications, data residency options, and our responsible disclosure policy.

trust.title: Built to earn your trust
trust.subtitle: AACsearch is designed from the ground up for security and compliance. Here is how we protect your data and your users.

soc2.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: AACsearch is SOC 2 Type II certified. The audit report is available under NDA to Enterprise plan customers.

gdpr.title: GDPR & CCPA
gdpr.description: Data Processing Agreement available to all paying plans. Data residency in EU and US. Right-to-be-forgotten deletion within 72 hours.

encryption.title: Encryption everywhere
encryption.description: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. API keys are stored as bcrypt hashes and never logged in plaintext.

dataResidency.title: Data residency
dataResidency.description: Choose EU (Frankfurt) or US (North Virginia) at sign-up. Data never leaves your selected region. Multi-region available on Enterprise.

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: Every admin action — index creation, key issuance, member invitation — is logged with actor identity, timestamp, and org context.

disclosure.title: Responsible disclosure
disclosure.description: Found a vulnerability? Email security@aacsearch.com. We follow a 90-day coordinated disclosure timeline and credit all reporters.

audit.title: Third-party audits
audit.description: AACsearch undergoes regular security audits by independent third parties. Reports are available under NDA for enterprise customers.

isolation.title: Tenant isolation
isolation.description: Every organization data is isolated at the infrastructure level. Cross-tenant access is architecturally impossible, not just policy-enforced.

tokens.title: Token-based authentication
tokens.description: API keys are hashed at rest using bcrypt. Scoped tokens use HMAC signing with server-side secrets. Plaintext keys are shown once and never stored.

accessControl.title: Access control
accessControl.description: Role-based access control (RBAC) with owner, admin, member, and viewer roles. API keys with granular permissions per index.

pentest.title: Penetration testing
pentest.description: Regular penetration tests by certified security firms. Summary reports are available to enterprise customers under NDA.

newsletterPage.title: Newsletter
newsletterPage.description: Monthly updates on search engineering, AACsearch releases, and the developer tools we follow.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: One email per month. Search engineering deep-dives, product updates, and links worth your time.

frequency.title: Monthly cadence
frequency.description: One email per month, every first Tuesday. No weekly digests, no daily updates — we respect your inbox.

content.title: What you will get
content.description: Search engineering articles, AACsearch release notes, developer tool highlights, and one community spotlight per issue.

past.title: Read past issues
past.description: Every newsletter is archived on our blog. Read before subscribing — you will know exactly what you are signing up for.

privacy.title: Your data stays yours
privacy.description: We use a self-hosted newsletter platform. Your email is never shared with ad networks or sold to data brokers.

unsubscribe.title: One-click unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Every email has a one-click unsubscribe link. No dark patterns, no confirmation dialogs.

social.title: Follow the highlights
social.description: Newsletter highlights are posted on LinkedIn. Follow us there for shorter-form engineering updates.

community.title: Community highlights
community.description: A monthly roundup of the best AACsearch community projects, plugins, and success stories from developers worldwide.

product.description: New features, performance improvements, and API changes. Changelog highlights delivered to your inbox monthly.

tutorials.description: Step-by-step guides for setting up search, migrating from competitors, and integrating AACsearch with popular frameworks.

benchmarks.description: Industry benchmarks for search latency, zero-result rates, and CTR. See how your search performance compares to peers.

industry.description: Trends, best practices, and research in search and discovery. Curated for product, engineering, and growth teams.

productUpdates.title: Product updates
productUpdates.description: New features, performance improvements, and API changes delivered to your inbox monthly.

searchTips.title: Search optimization tips
searchTips.description: Practical tips for improving search relevance, reducing zero-result rates, and tuning your indexes for better performance.

showcase.title: Customer showcase
showcase.description: See how other teams use AACsearch to power search across e-commerce, SaaS, media, and enterprise applications.

communityPage.title: Community
communityPage.description: Join the AACsearch community — ask questions, share projects, contribute connectors, and shape the roadmap.

community.title: Build search, together
community.subtitle: AACsearch is built in public. The community votes on features, contributes connectors, and helps newcomers ship faster.

github.title: GitHub
github.description: Star the repo, open issues, or contribute a PR. All public roadmap items are tracked as GitHub issues.

discord.title: Discord
discord.description: Real-time chat for questions, integrations, and troubleshooting. 500+ members, active every day.

forum.title: Community forum
forum.description: Long-form Q&A for architecture questions, integration guides, and feature proposals. Fully searchable — powered by AACsearch.

showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.description: See what the community has built with AACsearch. Submit your project to be featured in the monthly newsletter.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: We accept contributions to connectors, SDK examples, and documentation. See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.

roadmap.title: Vote on the roadmap
roadmap.description: Every public roadmap item is open for community upvotes. The most-voted features ship first.

events.title: Events & meetups
events.description: Join AACsearch at industry events, webinars, and community meetups. Connect with the team and fellow developers.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.description: Documentation, community, and direct support — whatever level of help your team needs to succeed with AACsearch.

support.title: We have got your back
support.subtitle: AACsearch support ranges from self-serve documentation to a dedicated Slack channel for Enterprise customers.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Full API reference, SDK guides, and integration tutorials. Versioned, searchable, and updated with every release.

community.title: Community forum
community.description: Ask questions and get peer support. Most questions get an answer within a few hours from the community or the AACsearch team.

email.title: Email support
email.description: Email support is included with Starter and above plans. Response SLA: 1 business day for Starter, 4 hours for Pro.

chat.title: Live chat
chat.description: In-dashboard live chat for Pro and Business plan customers. Connects directly to the AACsearch support team during business hours.

slack.title: Dedicated Slack channel
slack.description: Enterprise customers get a shared Slack Connect channel with the AACsearch engineering and support team.

sla.title: Support SLA
sla.description: Enterprise SLA: 99.95% uptime, 4-hour critical response, dedicated channel manager, and named technical contact.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Comprehensive guides, API reference, SDK documentation, and integration tutorials at docs.aacsearch.com.

enterprise.title: Enterprise support
enterprise.description: Dedicated Slack channel, phone support, custom SLAs, and a named support engineer. Priority response time under 1 hour.

onboarding.title: Onboarding assistance
onboarding.description: Free onboarding call for Pro and Enterprise plans. Our team helps you set up your index, configure the widget, and integrate the SDK.

status.title: System status
status.description: Real-time status dashboard showing uptime, latency, and incident history across all AACsearch services at status.aacsearch.com.

statusPage.title: Service Status
statusPage.description: Real-time status of the AACsearch API, dashboard, and global infrastructure. Subscribe to incident notifications.

status.title: System status
status.subtitle: We measure uptime across every component of the AACsearch platform and publish incident reports within 24 hours.

api.title: Search API
api.description: The AACsearch public search API. Measures end-to-end latency and availability from five global probe locations.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: The AACsearch web dashboard and management API. Includes oRPC endpoints, auth, and organisation management.

ingest.title: Ingest pipeline
ingest.description: Document ingestion from the Connector API and REST API. Measures queue depth, processing latency, and error rate.

analytics.title: Analytics pipeline
analytics.description: Search event collection, aggregation, and dashboard updates. Typically lags real-time by 60-90 seconds.

incidents.title: Incident history
incidents.description: Every incident is documented with timeline, root cause, and remediation steps. Published within 24 hours of resolution.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to alerts
subscribe.description: Get notified by email or webhook when incident status changes. Powered by our public status API.

uptime.title: 99.99% uptime SLA
uptime.description: Enterprise plan includes a 99.99% uptime SLA with credits for any downtime. Real-time status at status.aacsearch.com.

maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
maintenance.description: Planned maintenance windows are announced at least 24 hours in advance. Subscribe to status page notifications for real-time updates.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about AACsearch pricing, setup, data, and support.

faq.title: Common questions, clear answers
faq.subtitle: Cannot find your answer here? Search our documentation or ask in the community forum.

searchUnit.title: What is a search unit?
searchUnit.description: One search unit equals one search query OR one document indexed. Your monthly plan includes a set number of search units, pooled across all indexes.

pricing.title: How does pricing work?
pricing.description: AACsearch charges a flat monthly fee per plan tier. Overages are billed at a per-search-unit rate. No hidden fees, no egress charges.

scaling.title: How does it scale?
scaling.description: AACsearch scales horizontally. The hosted platform handles traffic spikes automatically. There is no per-replica or per-shard cost.

dataResidency.title: Where is my data stored?
dataResidency.description: Choose EU (Frankfurt) or US (North Virginia) at sign-up. Data never leaves your selected region. Multi-region available on Enterprise.

migration.title: Can I migrate from Algolia?
migration.description: Yes. The AACsearch REST API is compatible with Algolia-style collection schemas. We provide a migration guide and one-time import tooling.

selfHost.title: Do you offer dedicated or on-prem deployment?
selfHost.description: Yes. Enterprise plans include a dedicated cluster in the region you choose. For regulated industries with strict data residency requirements, contact us to scope a custom deployment.

data.title: Where is my data stored?
data.description: AACsearch runs on AWS in the region closest to your user base. Data stays in the chosen region and never leaves without your authorization.

limits.title: What are the plan limits?
limits.description: Free: 1,000 search-units/month, 1 index, 1 API key. Pro: 50,000 search-units/month, unlimited indexes, 10 API keys. Enterprise: custom limits and SLAs.

migrate.title: How do I migrate from Typesense?
migrate.description: AACsearch is built on Typesense and uses the same search core. Migrate by exporting your index schema and documents, then reindexing via the AACsearch API. Most users complete the move in under a day.

support.title: What support options are available?
support.description: Free plan: community support via Discord. Pro: email support within 24 hours. Enterprise: dedicated Slack channel and phone support with 1-hour SLA.

typesense.title: How is AACsearch different from Typesense Cloud?
typesense.description: AACsearch is a managed search platform built on Typesense with additional features: multi-tenancy, scoped tokens, analytics dashboard, CMS connectors, knowledge RAG, and a hosted widget — all included in the price.

affiliatePage.title: Affiliate Program
affiliatePage.description: Earn recurring commissions by referring developers and companies to AACsearch. Join the affiliate program today.

affiliate.title: Earn with AACsearch
affiliate.subtitle: Recommend AACsearch to your audience and earn 20% recurring commission on every paying customer you refer.

commission.title: 20% recurring commission
commission.description: Earn 20% of the monthly plan fee for every customer you refer, for the lifetime of their subscription. No cap, no expiry.

tracking.title: Reliable attribution
tracking.description: 90-day cookie window. Affiliate attribution is tracked across devices via first-party cookies and UTM parameters.

creatives.title: Marketing assets
creatives.description: Banners, email templates, comparison tables, and code examples — all ready to embed in tutorials, newsletters, and social posts.

payments.title: Monthly payouts
payments.description: Payouts processed on the 15th of every month via Stripe or wire transfer. Minimum payout threshold: $50.

supportChannel.title: Affiliate support
supportChannel.description: Dedicated affiliate manager, early access to new features, and a private affiliate Discord channel for networking.

apply.title: Apply now
apply.description: Apply at affiliate.aacsearch.com. We review applications within 3 business days. No minimum audience size required.

payouts.title: Generous payouts
payouts.description: Earn 20% recurring commission on every subscription you refer. Paid monthly via Stripe, no minimum threshold.

support.title: Dedicated affiliate support
support.description: Get a personal affiliate manager, promotional materials, and a custom landing page for your audience.

pricingPlansPage.title: Compare Plans
pricingPlansPage.description: Detailed feature comparison across Free, Starter, Pro, Business, and Enterprise plans.

pricingPlans.title: Plans for every stage
pricingPlans.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more search units, indexes, or support. All plans include the full API and dashboard.

free.title: Free
free.description: 10,000 search units per month, 1 index, community support. Perfect for side projects and proof-of-concept implementations.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: 250,000 search units per month, 5 indexes, email support. Ideal for small SaaS products and growing developer tools.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: 1 million search units per month, 20 indexes, custom origin allow-lists, priority email support. Built for production SaaS.

business.title: Business
business.description: 5 million search units per month, unlimited indexes, SSO, audit log, 4-hour email SLA. For teams that depend on search.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Unmetered search units, dedicated cluster, 99.95% SLA, Slack support channel, and a named technical account manager.

custom.title: Need something different?
custom.description: Non-standard requirements — on-prem deployment, data residency agreements, white-labelling — are handled as custom contracts.

overage.title: Overage pricing
overage.description: Exceed your plan limit and pay only for what you use. Overage is billed at $0.50 per 1,000 search-units with no hard cap — search keeps working.

allPagesPage.title: All Pages
allPagesPage.description: A complete index of all AACsearch pages — marketing site, features, integrations, and the application.

connectorsPage.title: CMS Connectors
connectorsPage.description: Native PHP modules for PrestaShop and 1C-Bitrix. REST Connector API for everything else.
connectorsPage.headlessCmsSubtitle: Plug AACsearch into your content infrastructure. Strapi, Contentful, and Sanity — all supported with native plugins.

strapi.title: Strapi
strapi.description: Strapi plugin with lifecycle hook sync. Every content create, update, and delete triggers automatic index updates. Content types, dynamic zones, and media fields — all supported.

contentful.title: Contentful
contentful.description: Contentful app with webhook-based sync. Publish an entry and it appears in AACsearch within a second. Content model mapping, rich text handling, and locale-aware search included.

sanity.title: Sanity
sanity.description: Sanity Studio plugin with GROQ-powered indexing. Select exactly which fields to index with GROQ projections. Real-time sync via webhook — no cron jobs required.

connectorsPage.comingSoonSubtitle: WooCommerce and Shopify support is in development. Use the Connector API to build your own today.

woocommerce.title: WooCommerce
woocommerce.description: WordPress + WooCommerce plugin. Sync products, categories, and orders.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.description: Shopify app with product, variant, and metafield sync. Widget embed included.

tutorialsPage.title: Video Tutorials
tutorialsPage.description: Watch step-by-step guides to get the most out of AACsearch — from 5-minute setup to advanced integrations.

quickstart.title: 5-Minute Quickstart
quickstart.description: Create an account, upload data, embed a search widget, and go live — all in under 5 minutes.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Search Setup
ecommerce.description: Configure product search with faceted navigation, scoped tokens per storefront, and analytics.

blog.title: Content / Blog Search
blog.description: Add instant full-text search to your blog or documentation site with typo tolerance.

app.title: SaaS App Search
app.description: Build multi-tenant search for your SaaS app with per-tenant isolation and scoped API keys.
